espn.name: Georgia Bulldogs at Alabama Crimson Tide

headlines.description: — Gunner Stockton and Georgia finally put an end to Alabama's mastery of the rivalry between Southeastern Conference powers.
headlines.shortLinkText: No. 3 Georgia ends No. 10 Alabama's hold on rivalry, beats Crimson Tide 28-7 to win SEC championship

video.headline: Georgia dominates Alabama in SEC title game

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia dominates Alabama in SEC title game) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Nate Frazier extends Georgia's lead with 9-yard TD run
highlights.description: Nate Frazier barrels into the end zone for a 9-yard touchdown to give Georgia a 21-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nate Frazier extends Georgia's lead with 9-yard TD run) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Georgia dominates Alabama in SEC title game
highlights.description: Georgia takes home the SEC crown after crushing Alabama 28-7.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia dominates Alabama in SEC title game) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

polymarket.title: Georgia vs. Alabama
polymarket.description:
In the upcoming CFB game, scheduled for December 6 at 4:00PM ET:

If the Georgia win, the market will resolve to "Georgia".

If the Alabama win, the market will resolve to "Alabama".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Spread: Georgia (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming college football game, scheduled for December 6 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Georgia" if Georgia win the game by 3 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Alabama".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: O/U 47.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming college football game, scheduled for December 6 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Georgia and Alabama combine to score 48 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 48, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Georgia vs. Alabama: 1H Moneyline
markets.description:
In the first half of the college football game between Georgia and Alabama, scheduled for December 6 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Georgia" if Georgia are winning at halftime.

This market will resolve to "Alabama" if Alabama are winning at halftime.

If the score is tied at halftime, this market will resolve 50-50.

The result will be determined based on the score at halftime only.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
